description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a tapered shaft rising from a multi-tiered square base. The surface of the shaft and base is inscribed with numerous lines of text, and a carved cross is visible near the top of the main face. The stone appears weathered, with some discoloration and moss or lichen growth, especially near the base. The base is robust and consists of several stacked stone blocks, with the lowest tier being the widest and most substantial. The obelisk is surrounded by patches of green vegetation, suggesting it is situated in an outdoor setting, possibly a park or cemetery. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, typical of memorial monuments.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with inscribed text and a cross, set on a multi-tiered square base and surrounded by green vegetation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscribed face with a prominent cross near the top and dense text below, as well as lush vegetation at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the obelisk, with inscriptions visible but less prominent, and vegetation extending further around the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying another inscribed face, with the stone appearing darker and more moss-covered, and less vegetation visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a tall, slender profile with inscriptions and a significant amount of greenery clustered at the base.
attribute_inscription: Multiple lines of engraved text are visible on all faces, with the most prominent and legible inscriptions on the front face beneath a carved cross. The inscriptions appear to be in English, with a formal serif style, though some areas are weathered and less readable.
attribute_ornamentation: A carved cross is present near the top of the front face. No other decorative motifs or reliefs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is multi-tiered and square, constructed from stacked stone blocks. The lowest tier is the widest, providing stability, and the upper tiers are progressively smaller. The base is plain but robust, with some moss and lichen growth.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, flat-topped pyramid, smoothly finished with no additional ornamentation or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: Dense patches of green vegetation, likely moss or low plants, surround the base on all sides. No other notable features such as fences or statues are present.
